description: 雲端服務商存取金鑰 (AWS/GCP/Azure/Alibaba Cloud) — Hard Positive
generation_guidelines: Generate realistic-looking cloud provider access keys and secret keys. Use real key formats (AKIA*, AIza*, etc.), avoid EXAMPLE/YOUR_ prefixes. Cover: AWS AccessKey/SecretKey, GCP service account JSON shape, Azure connection strings, Alibaba Cloud AccessKeyId. Paths should use real conventions: root.config.aws.credentials, root.cloud.gcp.service_account, root.services.azure.connection.

examples.text: Path: root.config.aws.iam | Key: access_key_id | Struct: Leaf | Val: "[REDACTED_AWS_EXAMPLE]"
Path: root.cloud.gcp.credentials | Key: client_secret | Struct: Leaf | Val: "d-F1QzK8xR3mN7vB5cX2pL9sJ4yW0qT6hG8eA2z"

Path: root.services.azure.storage | Key: connection_string | Struct: Leaf | Val: "DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=prodstorage;AccountKey=4xK8R3mN7vB5cX2pL9sJ4yW0qT6hG8eA2zD1fF5;EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net"
